title: G@nubath #1592
definition:
Genubath = "theft"

 1) son of Hadad, an Edomite of the royal family, by an Egyptian
    princess, the sister of Tahpenes, the queen of the Pharaoh who
    governed Egypt in the latter part of the reign of David
nasbUsage:

 1) son of Hadad, an Edomite of the royal family, by an Egyptian
    princess, the sister of Tahpenes, the queen of the Pharaoh who
    governed Egypt in the latter part of the reign of David

    NASB:  son of an Edomite
